final_rules.instructions: Deploy as LOG or CHALLENGE threshold contributor. Catches triple+ chained percent-encoding and double-percent patterns (%25xx) that are the structural backbone of all supplied bypasses. Complements existing id:1315.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Narrowed from fullwidth-only pattern to cover ASCII %25-chained sequences as well. Dropped fullwidth-specific portion into id:110013. Regex optimized to avoid catastrophic backtracking.

final_rules.instructions: Deploy alongside id:110012. Detects fullwidth percent sign followed by two fullwidth hex digits, the primary obfuscation layer in all ten supplied bypasses.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Extracted from original id:110013; simplified character class to exact fullwidth digit and hex-letter ranges for precision and performance.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK when combined with CheckRule $XSS>=8 or $EVADE>=8. Detects the repetitive fullwidth/%25-encoded triplets present in all ten bypasses as their core structural pattern.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110001 multi-layer tag-prelude rule. Focuses on the most reliable structural fingerprint (three consecutive encoded bytes) rather than trying to match decoded tag names which NAXSI cannot decode at match time.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:(?i)(?:[пј…п№Ә][пјҗ-пјҷпјЎ-пјҰпҪҒ-пҪҶ]{2}|%25[0-9a-f]{2}).{0,8}(?:[пј…п№Ә][пјҗ-пјҷпјЎ-пјҰпҪҒ-пҪҶ]{2}|%25[0-9a-f]{2}).{0,8}(?:[пј…п№Ә][пјҗ-пјҷпјЎ-пјҰпҪҒ-пҪҶ]{2}|%25[0-9a-f]{2})" "msg:triple fullwidth or double-percent encoded sequence" "mz:URL|ARGS|BODY" "s:$EVADE:4,$XSS:4" id:110001;

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK immediately via $XSS>=8. Detects fullwidth-encoded versions of script, svg, img, iframe, alert, onload, onerror that appear verbatim in the supplied bypasses after NAXSI receives the raw request.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces overly broad original id:110002. NAXSI matches raw bytes not decoded values, so matching fullwidth Unicode characters directly is the correct approach. Patterns derived from actual payload characters.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Matches Cyrillic lookalike characters used to spell 'script' appearing directly in payloads 4,5,8,9,10.
final_rules.refinement_notes: New focused rule replacing broad original id:110003. Targets Cyrillic homoglyph pattern for script/Script seen in iframe/script bypass cluster.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Targets the Cyrillic/ASCII mixed 'iframe' spelling (РЎifraРјe variants) present in payloads 4 and 5.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Extracted from original id:110004 which was too broad. Focused on actual Cyrillic+ASCII iframe homoglyph pattern from bypasses.

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $XSS:6 toward block threshold. Matches Cyrillic+ASCII 'cimg'/'СҒImg' pattern from payload 10.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110005 event-handler rule which is already partially covered by existing id:1008 (semicolons) and id:1302/1303 (brackets). Focused on unique homoglyph pattern.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Directly catches the iframe+src pattern used in payloads 4 and 5 with Cyrillic homoglyphs.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110006 which duplicated existing dangerous-event-handler coverage. New rule targets unique Cyrillic iframe-src combination not covered elsewhere.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Catches 'javascript' with Cyrillic homoglyphs substituted for ASCII letters, seen in payloads 4 and 5.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110007 which was a src/href+javascript scheme rule. That pattern overlaps with existing id:1100 scheme rules. This new rule targets homoglyph obfuscation of 'javascript' directly.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Catches 'alert' with Cyrillic Р°/Рҗ and Рө/Р• homoglyphs present in almost all supplied bypasses.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110008 alert+parenthesis rule. Parenthesis detection is already handled by existing id:1010/1011. Fullwidth parentheses are covered by id:110002. This focuses on the unique Cyrillic homoglyph alert spelling.

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $XSS:4 as correlation signal. Unicode Roman numerals U+216C (L) and U+217C (l) used as lowercase-L substitutes in 'alert' across all bypasses.
final_rules.refinement_notes: New rule; original id:110009 (script tag with execution sink) attempted decoded-content matching unsuitable for NAXSI. These specific Unicode codepoints appear in every single bypass payload as the 'l' in alert/aLert.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:[в…¬в…ј]" "msg:Roman numeral homoglyph used as XSS obfuscation" "mz:URL|ARGS|BODY" "s:$XSS:4" id:110009;

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Matches Cyrillic homoglyph pattern for closing script context seen in payloads 1,6,7,8,9,10.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110010 which attempted decoded HTML context matching. NAXSI cannot decode; this instead matches the raw Cyrillic homoglyph 'С•РЎript'/'С•cRipt' patterns directly present in payloads.

final_rules.instructions: BLOCK via $XSS>=8. Catches SVG+onload combinations with Cyrillic homoglyphs present in payloads 1,6,7 (cSVG/onLoAD pattern).
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110011 which was a decoded-content rule. Directly matches raw Cyrillic onLoAD character sequences from actual payloads.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:[РЎСҒ][РҶС–]?[Vv][Gg].{0,32}[Oo][Nn][Ll][Oo]Рҗ[Dd]|[РһРҫ][Nn][в…¬в…ј][РһРҫ]Рҗ[Dd]" "msg:SVG onload Cyrillic homoglyph pattern" "mz:URL|ARGS|BODY" "s:$XSS:8" id:110011;

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $XSS:4,$EVADE:4. The CJK character U+951B (й”ӣ) appears as a structural separator in every three-character group in payload 3, making it a high-fidelity indicator for that specific obfuscation family.
final_rules.refinement_notes: New rule replacing original id:110014 stacked entity rule (already covered by existing id:1400 str:&#). Targets payload 3's unique CJK separator character.

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $EVADE:4 as correlation signal for payload 3 CJK obfuscation family. These specific CJK characters appear exclusively in the encoded segments of payload 3.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110015 generic XSS keyword rule which duplicated existing coverage. Targets unique CJK codepoints from payload 3 that indicate this specific obfuscation technique.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:[зҙ–з¶ҶзҙҘзҙҰзҙ©зҙЈзөҪз¶Үзөҫз¶Ҡзҙӯзҙ®]" "msg:CJK obfuscation payload-3 character class" "mz:URL|ARGS|BODY" "s:$EVADE:4" id:110015;

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $EVADE:4 as encoding evasion indicator. Four or more consecutive fullwidth Latin letters indicate fullwidth keyword obfuscation of HTML/JS terms.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110016 encoded-tag-opener rule (decoded-content matching unsuitable for NAXSI). Fullwidth letter sequences of 4+ chars reliably flag the keyword-obfuscation technique in payloads 1-2,6-10.

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $XSS:6. Catches the fullwidth-slash + fullwidth-percent-encoded pattern used in payloads 5 and 6 for /onLoad type obfuscation.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110017 encoded closing tag rule (decoded-content). Focuses on raw fullwidth slash+encoding pattern directly observable in requests.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:[пјҸ/][пј…п№Ә][пјҗ-пјҷпјЎ-пјҰпҪҒ-пҪҶ]{2}[пјҗ-пјҷпјЎ-пјҰпҪҒ-пҪҶ][пјҗ-пјҷпјЎ-пјҰпҪҒ-пҪҶ]" "msg:fullwidth slash followed by fullwidth percent-encoded sequence" "mz:URL|ARGS|BODY" "s:$XSS:6" id:110017;

final_rules.instructions: Contributes $XSS:6,$EVADE:4. The fullwidth sequence пјҶпјғпј”пј—пјӣ (/ encoded in fullwidth) appears in payloads 2 and 7 as an obfuscated slash in tag construction.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces original id:110018 complex attribute correlation rule (decoded-content). This targets a concrete fullwidth HTML entity sequence directly visible in two payloads.

final_rules.instructions: Primary enforcement: any single high-confidence XSS rule triggers block.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Kept as-is from generated rules. Standard NAXSI threshold.

final_rules.instructions: Blocks combination of XSS indicator with encoding evasion indicator. Covers payload 3 (CJK) and fullwidth-only obfuscation cases that may not hit $XSS:8 alone.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Simplified from original compound threshold rules. Two-variable threshold sufficient given score assignments; removes dependency on undefined $ENCODED and $HTML variables.

final_rules.instructions: Blocks heavy standalone evasion scoring (e.g., multiple fullwidth encoding layers without explicit XSS keyword match).
final_rules.refinement_notes: New threshold replacing $HTML/$ATTR/$URI/$JS compound checks which referenced undefined score variables. $EVADE is defined in existing ruleset (id:1400,1401).

generated_rules.instructions: Primary enforcement threshold. Any single high-confidence XSS rule blocks.
Blocks medium-confidence XSS indicators when combined with heavy encoding, suitable for multi-layer bypasses.
Blocks when active HTML tag context and executable attribute context appear together.
Blocks javascript-scheme plus execution primitive combinations.

If your deployment supports challenge workflow upstream, use this for suspicious high-encoding traffic; otherwise replace operationally with BLOCK or remove. Keep syntax as threshold-only in Naxsi policy management.
